property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users\acer\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Apache\Maven in;C:\Program Files\Apache\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.15 in;C:\Users\acer\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\acer\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\acer\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\acer\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;c:\Users\acer\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-001 - Create Todo with Valid Payload", "Todos Module Testing"](1)
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: TC-001 - Create Todo with Valid Payload # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:19 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: POST Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/8448441/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: userId=8448441 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Learn API", "status": "pending" } ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo "Learn API" "pending" "8448441" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoOutline(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 201 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "201 Created" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value "Learn API" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains field "status" with value "pending" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains generated todo "id" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyGeneratedField(java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-001 - Create Todo with Valid Payload", "Todos Module Testing"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: TC-001 - Create Todo with Valid Payload # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:20 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: POST Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/8448441/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: userId=8448441 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Write Tests", "status": "completed" } ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo "Write Tests" "completed" "8448441" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoOutline(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 201 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "201 Created" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value "Write Tests" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains field "status" with value "completed" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains generated todo "id" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyGeneratedField(java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-001 - Create Todo with Valid Payload", "Todos Module Testing"](3)
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: TC-001 - Create Todo with Valid Payload # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:21 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: POST Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/8448441/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: userId=8448441 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Automation Task", "status": "pending" } ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo "Automation Task" "pending" "8448441" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoOutline(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 201 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "201 Created" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value "Automation Task" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains field "status" with value "pending" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains generated todo "id" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyGeneratedField(java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-002 - Create Todo using Excel Data", "Todos Module Testing"](4)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-002 - Create Todo using Excel Data # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:23 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: POST Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/8448441/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: userId=8448441 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Learn API", "status": "pending" } ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo with data from excel # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoExcel() ✔ Then Response status code should be 201 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "201 Created" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value from excel # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValueFromExcel(java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----
testcase.system-err: ERROR StatusLogger Log4j2 could not find a logging implementation. Please add log4j-core to the classpath. Using SimpleLogger to log to the console...

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-003 - Create Todo using DataTable", "Todos Module Testing"](5)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-003 - Create Todo using DataTable # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:30 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: POST Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/8448441/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: userId=8448441 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "DataTableTodo", "status": "completed" } ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo with the following details: # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoDataTable(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | title | status | userId | | DataTableTodo | completed | 8448441 | ✔ Then Response status code should be 201 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "201 Created" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value "DataTableTodo" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-004 - Create Todo with Invalid User ID", "Todos Module Testing"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-004 - Create Todo with Invalid User ID # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:39 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: POST Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/99999/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: userId=99999 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 99999, "title": "Invalid", "status": "pending" } ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo with invalid userId "99999" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoInvalidUser(java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 422 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "Unprocessable Entity" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains an appropriate error message # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyErrorMessage() ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-005 - Get Todo by Valid ID", "Todos Module Testing"](7)

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Schema file not found: schemas/Todo.json – create it at src/test/resources/schemas/Todo.json

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Schema file not found: schemas/Todo.json – create it at src/test/resources/schemas/Todo.json at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at hooks.Hooks.afterScenario(Hooks.java:27)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-005 - Get Todo by Valid ID # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:47 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: GET Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos/103013 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: todoId=103013 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> ✔ When I send GET todo request with id "102871" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.getTodoById(java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 200 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "200 OK" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Validate "Todo" schema # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.validateSchema(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains field "id" with value "102871" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And Response body contains field "status" with value "pending" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished ----- java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Schema file not found: schemas/Todo.json – create it at src/test/resources/schemas/Todo.json at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at hooks.Hooks.afterScenario(Hooks.java:27)

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-006 - Get Todo by Invalid ID", "Todos Module Testing"](8)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-006 - Get Todo by Invalid ID # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:56 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: GET Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos/99999 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: todoId=99999 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> ✔ When I send GET todo request with id "99999" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.getTodoById(java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 404 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "Not Found" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains an appropriate error message # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyErrorMessage() ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-007 - Get All Todos", "Todos Module Testing"](9)

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Schema file not found: schemas/TodoList.json – create it at src/test/resources/schemas/TodoList.json

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Schema file not found: schemas/TodoList.json – create it at src/test/resources/schemas/TodoList.json at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at hooks.Hooks.afterScenario(Hooks.java:27)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-007 - Get All Todos # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:63 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: GET Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> ✔ When I send GET request to fetch all todos # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.getAllTodos() ✔ Then Response status code should be 200 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "200 OK" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body should be a JSON array # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyJsonArray() ✔ And Validate "TodoList" schema # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.validateSchema(java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished ----- java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Schema file not found: schemas/TodoList.json – create it at src/test/resources/schemas/TodoList.json at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at hooks.Hooks.afterScenario(Hooks.java:27)

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-008 - Update Todo using Excel Data", "Todos Module Testing"](10)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-008 - Update Todo using Excel Data # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:72 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: PUT Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos/103013 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: todoId=103013 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Updated Todo", "status": "completed" } ✔ When I send PUT request to update todo "102871" with data from excel # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.updateTodoExcel(java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 200 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "200 OK" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value from excel # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValueFromExcel(java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-009 - Update Todo using DataTable", "Todos Module Testing"](11)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-009 - Update Todo using DataTable # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:79 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: PUT Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos/103013 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: todoId=103013 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Updated Todo", "status": "completed" } ✔ When I send PUT request to update todo "102871" with the following details: # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.updateTodoDataTable(java.lang.String,io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | title | status | userId | | Updated Todo | completed | 8448441 | ✔ Then Response status code should be 200 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "200 OK" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains field "title" with value "Updated Todo" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyFieldValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-010 - Update Todo with Invalid ID", "Todos Module Testing"](12)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-010 - Update Todo with Invalid ID # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:88 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: PUT Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos/99999 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: todoId=99999 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "user_id": 8448441, "title": "Test", "status": "pending" } ✔ When I send PUT request to update todo "99999" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.updateTodoInvalidId(java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 404 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "Not Found" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body contains an appropriate error message # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyErrorMessage() ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-011 - Delete Todo", "Todos Module Testing"](13)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-011 - Delete Todo # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:96 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() Request method: DELETE Request URI: https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/todos/103013 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: todoId=103013 Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer f2eab2d47fcbaea74a0748fed9ad92f7603b02a16130f36a2210c09ff5200593 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> ✔ When I send DELETE request for todo "102871" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.deleteTodo(java.lang.String) ✔ Then Response status code should be 204 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-012 - POST Todo with Invalid Token", "Todos Module Testing"](14)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-012 - POST Todo with Invalid Token # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:102 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() ✔ When I send POST request to create a todo with invalid token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.createTodoInvalidToken() ✔ Then Response status code should be 401 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "Unauthorized" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body indicates authentication or authorization failure # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyAuthFailure() ----- Test Finished -----

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-013 - GET /todos with No Auth returns 401", "Todos Module Testing"](15)

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Expected status 401 but got 200. Body: [{"id":102990,"user_id":8451161,"title":"Nemo tero paulatim caute amiculum ab viduata victoria.","due_on":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000+05:30","status":"pending"},{"id":102989,"user_id":8451160,"title":"Calco inventore sed venia debitis condico aestus arbustum strues.","due_on":"2026-05-06T00:00:00.000+0, Status line [HTTP/1.1 200 OK] does not contain: Unauthorized, Expected 401 or 403 for auth failure but got 200

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Expected status 401 but got 200. Body: [{"id":102990,"user_id":8451161,"title":"Nemo tero paulatim caute amiculum ab viduata victoria.","due_on":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000+05:30","status":"pending"},{"id":102989,"user_id":8451160,"title":"Calco inventore sed venia debitis condico aestus arbustum strues.","due_on":"2026-05-06T00:00:00.000+0, Status line [HTTP/1.1 200 OK] does not contain: Unauthorized, Expected 401 or 403 for auth failure but got 200 at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at hooks.Hooks.afterScenario(Hooks.java:27)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: TC-013 - GET /todos with No Auth returns 401 # src/test/resources/features/Todos_feature.feature:109 ----- Test Started ----- ✔ Given the GoRest Todos API is accessible with a valid bearer token # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.setup() ✔ When I send GET request to fetch all todos with no auth # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.getAllTodosWithNoAuth() ✔ Then Response status code should be 401 # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusCode(int) ✔ And Response status line contains "Unauthorized" # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyStatusLine(java.lang.String) ✔ And Response time less than 3000 ms # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyResponseTime(int) ✔ And Response body indicates authentication or authorization failure # stepDefinitions.TodosSteps.verifyAuthFailure() ----- Test Finished ----- java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Expected status 401 but got 200. Body: [{"id":102990,"user_id":8451161,"title":"Nemo tero paulatim caute amiculum ab viduata victoria.","due_on":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000+05:30","status":"pending"},{"id":102989,"user_id":8451160,"title":"Calco inventore sed venia debitis condico aestus arbustum strues.","due_on":"2026-05-06T00:00:00.000+0, Status line [HTTP/1.1 200 OK] does not contain: Unauthorized, Expected 401 or 403 for auth failure but got 200 at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at hooks.Hooks.afterScenario(Hooks.java:27)
